title: Mike's Immersive & QOL Pack
description: An immersive and QOL singleplayer/small server modpack featuring many hand-picked mods to make Minecraft feel like a new experience.
body:
# A new, revitalized experience
This modpack (for 1.20.4) features many hand picked mods that intend to create a new and immersive experience in Minecraft while still maintaining the major core aspects of the game.

The modpack features many quality of life improvements and small additions to Minecraft's vanilla experience. Some highlights include:
- Basic quality of life features (such as appleskin, bufixes, optimizations, etc.)
- Visual QOL mods (such as eating animations and visuality)
- WorldHost mod (READ https://modrinth.com/mod/world-host FOR MORE INFO)
- All (if not most) of YUNG's structure mods
- A first-person player model (configurable)
- Better Combat mod (minecraft dungeons style pvp)
- CameraOverhaul mod (adds strafing camera tilt, etc. and is highly configurable)
- Preconfigured settings (so that keybinds don't conflict)
- First world join chat tutorial and tutorial world (soom to come)
- Slight mob overhauls
- Included shaders
- UI enhancements (such as Smooth Swapping and small animations via Smooth Gui)
- Amplified Nether
- Deeper and Darker
- And many more! 

To avoid the description from being lengthy, please take a look at the full mod list as it provides some information that the first join message can't. If you're not familiar with some of the content additions (such as Deeper and Darker), please refer to the mods own page for information.

**PLEASE DO NOT USE THIS MODPACK ON A PUBLIC SERVER OTHER THAN YOUR OWN!** There are many mods in this modpack that can get you banned in servers such as Hypixel or Cubecraft. Some of these mods include "Accurate Block Placement Reborn", "Mouse Tweaks", "Inventory Sorting", etc.

None of the mods are made by me. All rights reserved for the original developers.

Icon created by my friend [@OctoSmug](https://twitter.com/OctoSmug) on Twitter!
